# GitHub Copilot — Lovable Reverse-Engineer Spec

Follow the instructions in [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) at the repo root. Supporting prompt library lives in `prompts/` and schemas in `schemas/`.

Trigger this skill when the user asks to reverse-engineer, document, re-platform, or extract a spec from a Lovable.dev project, given local paths to the repo and a chat-history export.
